nasb.text: After the earthquake a fire, but the Lord  was not in the fire; and after the fire a sound of a gentle blowing.

esv.text: And after the earthquake a fire, but the Lord was not in the fire. And after the fire the sound of a low whisper.

cnv.text: 地震過後有火，耶和華也不在火中；火後有低微柔和的聲音。

ccb.text: 地震之后又有火，但耶和华也不在火中。之后，传来微小的声音。
